data_text_eon_ticket.inc.UnknownString_81C5033: DAD: {PLAYER}! Good to see you!\nThere's a letter here for you, {PLAYER}.
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.UnknownString_81C5070: DAD: I guess this is a PASS for a ship.\nBut I've never seen this ship before.\pYou should find out what this is about\nin LILYCOVE.
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.EventTicket_Text_ThatPass: The ferry to SLATEPORT is...\pOh?\nThat PASS...
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.EventTicket_Text_ShowEonTicket:
Aye, mate, are you the one who brought
that mighty odd PASS?\pI'll tell you, you're trying to reach a
tiny spit of an island far in the south.\pThere's no telling what we'll encounter
once we reach there, aye.\lThat shivers my timbers!\pAll aboard!
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C5215: Aye, mate, there's nothing here to\nsee or do on this forgettable island.\pWhat say we sail back to LILYCOVE?
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C5281: Aye, right, then!\nSail home we will!
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C52A6: Aye, right, as you like, then.
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Interior_Text_1C52C5: “All dreams are but another reality.\nNever forget...”
data_text_eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C52FB: “Those whose memories fade seek to\ncarve them in their hearts...”
